result.stdout:
Usage:
  basic-trace [options]

Options:
  -p, --process <processIdOrName>    Required. The ID or name of the process
                                     to collect the trace from.
  -o, --output <file>                The output path for the collected trace
                                     data. Defaults to 'trace.nettrace'.
  --buffersize <size>                Sets the size of the in-memory circular
                                     buffer in megabytes. Defaults to 256 MB.
  --version                          Display version information
